nodes.id: Phase transitions in Doi-Onsager, Noisy Transformer, and other multimodal models
nodes.title: Phase transitions in Doi-Onsager, Noisy Transformer, and other multimodal models
nodes.summary: 探討多模態模型的相變行為
nodes.contribution: 發現多模態模型中的相變現象對模型性能有重要影響，提出了一種新的相變偵測方法
directions: 將此方法應用於其他類型的深度學習模型
研究相變行為對模型泛化能力的影響

nodes.id: Geometric regularization of autoencoders via observed stochastic dynamics
nodes.title: Geometric regularization of autoencoders via observed stochastic dynamics
nodes.summary: 提出了一種基於幾何正則化的自編碼器
nodes.contribution: 設計了一種新的正則化項，利用觀測到的隨機動力學來改善自編碼器的性能
directions: 將此方法應用於其他類型的生成模型
研究幾何正則化對模型表達能力的影響

nodes.id: Evaluating the Progression of Large Language Model Capabilities for Small-Molecule Drug Design
nodes.title: Evaluating the Progression of Large Language Model Capabilities for Small-Molecule Drug Design
nodes.summary: 評估大型語言模型在小分子藥物設計中的能力
nodes.contribution: 提出了一種新的評估框架，用于評估大型語言模型在小分子藥物設計中的性能
directions: 將此框架應用於其他類型的藥物設計任務
研究大型語言模型在藥物設計中的局限性和挑戰

nodes.id: Learning to Reason with Insight for Informal Theorem Proving
nodes.title: Learning to Reason with Insight for Informal Theorem Proving

nodes.contribution: 設計了一種新的推理框架，利用洞察力來改善非正式定理證明的性能

研究洞察力對推理性能的影響

nodes.id: FL-MHSM: Spatially-adaptive Fusion and Ensemble Learning for Flood-Landslide Multi-Hazard Susceptibility Mapping at Regional Scale
nodes.title: FL-MHSM: Spatially-adaptive Fusion and Ensemble Learning for Flood-Landslide Multi-Hazard Susceptibility Mapping at Regional Scale
nodes.summary: 提出了一種新的多危險性評估方法

directions: 將此方法應用於其他類型的自然災害評估任務
研究空間自適應融合對評估性能的影響

nodes.id: Information Router for Mitigating Modality Dominance in Vision-Language Models
nodes.title: Information Router for Mitigating Modality Dominance in Vision-Language Models
nodes.summary: 提出了一種新的視覺語言模型

nodes.title: Beyond Distribution Sharpening: The Importance of Task Rewards

nodes.title: Joint-Centric Dual Contrastive Alignment with Structure-Preserving and Information-Balanced Regularization

nodes.title: Detecting and Suppressing Reward Hacking with Gradient Fingerprints

nodes.title: Enhancing AI and Dynamical Subseasonal Forecasts with Probabilistic Bias Correction

nodes.title: OT on the Map: Quantifying Domain Shifts in Geographic Space

nodes.title: A Bayesian Updating Framework for Long-term Multi-Environment Trial Data in Plant Breeding

links.source: Phase transitions in Doi-Onsager, Noisy Transformer, and other multimodal models
links.target: Information Router for Mitigating Modality Dominance in Vision-Language Models
links.hidden_insight: 這兩篇論文都關注於多模態模型的性能改善，前者探討相變行為，後者提出信息路由機制，兩者都旨在減輕模態主導現象對模型性能的影響。

links.source: Geometric regularization of autoencoders via observed stochastic dynamics
links.target: Joint-Centric Dual Contrastive Alignment with Structure-Preserving and Information-Balanced Regularization
links.hidden_insight: 這兩篇論文都關注於模型正則化，前者提出幾何正則化，後者提出對比對齊框架，兩者都旨在改善模型的性能和泛化能力。

links.source: Evaluating the Progression of Large Language Model Capabilities for Small-Molecule Drug Design
links.target: Sketching the Readout of Large Language Models for Scalable Data Attribution and Valuation
links.hidden_insight: 這兩篇論文都關注於大型語言模型的應用，前者評估模型在小分子藥物設計中的能力，後者提出大型語言模型讀出框架，兩者都旨在改善模型的性能和可擴展性。
